name: Olin Corporation
description: Olin Corporation is a leading vertically integrated global manufacturer and distributor of chemical products and a prominent U.S. manufacturer of ammunition. Founded in 1892, the company operates through three primary business segments: Chlor Alkali Products & Vinyls, Epoxy, and Winchester. Olin provides essential materials and solutions that enhance and protect lives across various industries. Headquartered in the United States, the company leverages its unique integration capabilities to deliver value to customers, investors, and communities while maintaining a strong commitment to safety, sustainability, and continuous innovation in its global operations.
